Lower Hive Encounters.result: A crowded, smog-choked market square. Desperate peddlers everywhere. The Interrogator demands Shulie find a specific black-market vendor for info on the target.
A patrol of corrupt Enforcers shaking down a hab-worker. They might recognize the cell's offworlder nature and try to extort them.
A press-gang from a local manufactorum looking for 'volunteers'. A good opportunity for the cell to blend in as indentured workers, if Shulie can smooth-talk them.
A Redemptionist street preacher whipping a ragged crowd into a frenzy. They are burning 'mutants'—which might include anyone with a Wyrd taint.
A broken elevator shaft with a makeshift pulley system acting as a toll-bridge. The toll collectors are part of a gang Shulie has history with.
A brutal street-brawl spilling out of a local drinking hole. The cell must navigate through without drawing attention or the Interrogator's wrath.
A clandestine meeting in a shadowed alley between a masked noble proxy and a local gang lieutenant. Is the noble tied to the 'Profane' Heretek target?
A flock of servo-skulls blaring Administratum propaganda. The 'Bald One' notices something hidden in the vox-code—a priority Inquisition transmission routing.
